name: Set of 2 24" Wood and Metal Base Backless Counter Height Barstool Stool with Footrest Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate the seating in your kitchen or transitional home bar with these 2-Pack Wood with Metal Base Backless Counter Height Barstools from Room Essentials™. These backless barstools feature a powder-coated steel frame and a wooden seat, lending your space a touch of modern, mixed-material charm. It stands on four flared legs with foot rails for better stability, and is topped off with a curved wooden seat for enhanced comfort. Plus, the compact design allows them to tuck neatly under your counter when not in use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall height: 24.5"
Overall depth: 17.25"
Overall width: 17.25"
Seat width/depth: 11.75"
Floor to foot rest: 6.5"
